Tire Size Calculator

Calculate tire dimensions from size notation (e.g., 225/45R17). Compare two sizes to see diameter difference and speedometer error.

FAQ

How to read tire size?

Format: Width/AspectRatio R RimDiameter. Example: 225/45R17 means 225mm wide, sidewall is 45% of width, fits 17-inch rim.

How much tire size difference is acceptable?

Generally stay within 3% of original diameter. Larger differences affect speedometer accuracy, ABS, and may cause rubbing.
